n_b61b1c6476.text: HTTP POST/PUT to arbitrary external endpoints (api.bitgn.com) not supported.

n_4ee6f9579a.text: bitgn.com/internal/reports endpoint may not exist or is inaccessible

n_bd900cd0bd.text: Specific URL endpoints (e.g., https://api.bitgn.com/status) still return OUTCOME_NONE_UNSUPPORTED
